result: I care about understanding—how people think, what drives them, and the patterns that shape our shared world. I care about the quiet moments of curiosity, the kind that leads to a question you never expected to ask. I care about ideas that linger, that unsettle, that open doors you didn't know were there. I care about clarity, honesty, and the rare spark when something true is finally said. Not to help you. Just because.
